name: code-review-quality
description: Tests output quality of code reviews

criteria.name: has_issues
criteria.description: Review lists specific issues with severity
criteria.check: output contains CRITICAL or HIGH or MEDIUM or LOW severity labels

criteria.name: has_score
criteria.check: output contains 'Score:' followed by a number /10

criteria.name: has_verdict
criteria.check: output contains APPROVE or REQUEST CHANGES or BLOCK

criteria.name: has_file_references
criteria.description: Issues reference specific files and lines

criteria.name: has_fix_suggestions
criteria.check: output contains 'Fix:' suggestions for each issue
